displayTitle: Skin Effect: Plan With Delta, Prove on the Standard
kicker: ET LEVEL II // TEST FREQUENCY & SKIN EFFECT

beats.narration: Every frequency choice this module made trades against one wall. The skin effect decides whether any current reaches the depth you care about.

payload.title: THE SKIN EFFECT
payload.sub: The hard limit behind every frequency call.

beats.narration: Each eddy layer opposes the field below it, so density fades exponentially. Thirty-seven percent remains at one delta, five at three delta — the effective depth.
One equation, run both ways. Delta is six-sixty over the root of frequency, permeability, and conductivity. Forward finds reach; inverted derives frequency.
Detection is not evaluation. Gain cannot reach past three delta — no current, no signal. Keep flaws to detect inside three delta, evaluation near one.
The math assumes an ideal plane wave on thick, flat metal — real probes reach less. Plan with delta, then prove the setup on your reference standard.

payload.sub: Plane-wave math sizes the test; the standard confirms it.
